model._hint: Base: FLUX.2-klein-4B (black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-4B) — 4B rectified-flow DiT, distilled for 4-step inference. Apache-2.0, commercial use allowed. Requires diffusers from git main (Flux2KleinPipeline not in stable release). ~13 GB VRAM; sequential_cpu_offload required on ≤16 GB unified memory.

generation._hint: 4 steps recommended (distilled model). Range: 1–8 practical. More steps do not significantly improve quality. | guidance_scale=1.0 per model card. Range: 1.0–3.0. Unlike FLUX.1-schnell, do NOT set to 0.0 — this distilled model retains a small positive CFG value. | Native 1024×1024. Arbitrary resolutions up to ~1 MP supported (e.g. 1152×896 landscape, 896×1152 portrait). Stay within ~1 MP for best results.

system._hint: ~13 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates high-quality general-purpose images quickly with the compact 4B FLUX.2-klein model. Suitable for a wide range of subjects: portraits, landscapes, objects, and abstract concepts. Faster than the full 12B FLUX models at comparable quality.
notes.prompt_guide:
No trigger word. Write detailed descriptive prompts. Examples: 'a golden sunset over mountain peaks, cinematic lighting', 'portrait of an elderly woman, natural light, photorealistic', 'a futuristic city street at night, neon reflections, wide angle'.

Negative prompt: Negative prompts have limited effect at low guidance_scale — the model is distilled and CFG guidance is reduced.
